headline: Link building, ranked by effort-to-result
standfirst: The full Month 2 link-building plan, grounded in the Jun 4 backlink pull. Tactics ordered by what actually moves the needle for a regulated broker.
summary_lead: Three free regulator listings, four free directory submissions, and one partnership ask are the first 30 days of work. The premier review directories (forexbrokers.com, brokerchooser.com) wait on a paid-placement budget decision. The current backlink position is healthy on anchor distribution but thin on premium authority — only 15 domains above Authority Score 40 and 1 above 60.

win_tiles.label: 90-day RD target
win_tiles.tip: Net new referring domains target over the next 90 days. Achievable with the Tier 1 free directory submissions + 3 regulator listings + 1 PR release per month.

win_tiles.label: Authority domains gained
win_tiles.tip: Domains at Authority Score 30 or higher are the ones that meaningfully move our own AS. Goal is 30 net new at this tier, mostly from regulator + tier-1 broker directory submissions.

win_tiles.label: /online-forex-trading/
win_tiles.tip: This commercial page is currently link-starved. Outreach focuses anchor variants on it to support its position-tracking keywords.

win_tiles.label: /prop-trading/
win_tiles.tip: Prop trading is competitive and our prop page only has 9 backlinks. Tier 2 prop-firm comparison sites are the unlock.

win_tiles.label: /account-comparison/
win_tiles.tip: Account-comparison pages are top-funnel for prospective traders. Currently only 3 links here. Linking from regulator + directory listings into this page lifts conversion + rankings together.

win_tiles.label: New directory listings
win_tiles.tip: We hold licenses in 4 jurisdictions but only Oman FSA currently shows on a public directory. Filing for the 3 missing listings is free and produces high-trust gov backlinks.

current_state.title: Current backlink position · Jun 4
current_state.subtitle: From the Semrush API pull · 426 records across 169 unique domains in this sample

rows.label: Authority Score
rows.tip: Domain Authority Score (Semrush 0-100). Held at 25 through the cleanup, which is the proof the disavow was healthy.

rows.label: Total referring domains
rows.tip: Total domains with at least one inbound link to cmsprime.com.

rows.label: AS 40+ domains (premium)
rows.tip: Domains with Authority Score 40 or higher. We have very few — this is the leverage point.

rows.label: AS 60+ domains (top-tier)
rows.tip: Top-tier authority domains. Almost none. Reaching forexbrokers.com / brokerchooser.com / fxempire.com would change this.

rows.label: dofollow / nofollow
rows.tip: A balanced dofollow-to-nofollow ratio looks natural. Pure dofollow looks engineered to Google.

rows.label: Brand-anchor share
rows.tip: 71% of anchor texts are brand variants (CMS Prime, cmsprime.com). This is Penguin-safe and we want to keep it there. Don't request exact-match anchors on outreach.

rows.label: Disavowed spam links
rows.tip: Telegram-anchor spam network links neutralized via the Jun 3 disavow file. Lesson: never buy backlink packages from Telegram channels.

link_gap.title: Where the link gap lives · commercial pages
link_gap.subtitle: Current backlinks per page vs the realistic target

tactics.title: Tactics · 8 plays ranked by effort-to-result
tactics.subtitle: Free + fast wins first, paid editorial follows budget approval

rows.name: Regulator directory listings
rows.summary: FSC Mauritius, SVG FSA, Saint Lucia FSRA — we hold licenses in all three but only Oman is currently listed. Single email each.

rows.name: Tier 1 free directory submissions
rows.summary: 100forexbrokers, forexrating, earnforex, topbrokers, myfxbook, forexpeacearmy. Submission forms, no editorial gatekeeping.

rows.name: Tier 1 editorial broker reviews
rows.summary: forexbrokers.com, brokerchooser.com, fxempire.com, dailyforex.com. Editorial review process; usually $1500-3500 sponsored placement.

rows.name: Regional MENA + Asia directories
rows.summary: arabicbroker, forex.ae, forexmena, zaforex, forex.pk, forexpersian. Feeds the AR + FA installs.

rows.name: Resource page outreach
rows.summary: Educational + comparison hubs (babypips, dailyfx). Lowest hit rate but real authority when it lands.

rows.name: Press release distribution
rows.summary: PRNewswire / BusinessWire for real product launches. Pair with CMS Webtrader updates, partnership announcements, schema deploys.

rows.name: Partnership co-marketing
rows.summary: Trading Central + AutoChartist + MetaQuotes + MQL5 partner pages — request inclusion under brokers list.

rows.name: Industry awards entries
rows.summary: Finance Magnates Awards, Global Forex Awards, World Finance Awards. Out of scope for Month 2 — budget annual.

targets_summary.title: Targets · 60+ prioritized domains
targets_summary.subtitle: From targets.csv — priority labels P0 to P3

pipeline.title: Outreach pipeline · current status
pipeline.subtitle: Tracker fields: drafted → sent → responded → placed / declined / no-response
pipeline.note: The two ‘sent’ rows are the existing Crypto Expo Dubai and Money Expo India relationships flagged as ‘keep warm’ for the next event cycle.

anti_patterns.title: What we will not do
anti_patterns.subtitle: Lessons from the Telegram-spam disavow + general SEO hygiene

rows.label: Buy Telegram/Discord backlink packages
rows.reason: Exactly what produced the BHS_LINKS + SEO_ANOMALY problem. 124+ links disavowed Jun 3. Burned the link graph for ~9 months. Never again.

rows.label: Request exact-match commercial anchor text
rows.reason: Anchors like ‘best ECN broker’ / ‘forex broker UAE’ trip Penguin. Brand anchors only on outreach. The current 71% brand share is what's keeping cmsprime.com Penguin-safe.

rows.label: Submit to web1.0 generic directories
rows.reason: Zero authority, often algorithmically penalized. Waste of time.

rows.label: Mass guest-post submissions on PBN networks
rows.reason: Same risk profile as the Telegram spam. Pattern is the same, outcome is the same.

rows.label: Forget the AR/FA installs
rows.reason: Three regulated languages means three link-building tracks. Regional MENA outreach (Tactic D) is the cheapest way to feed cmsprime.com/ar/ and cmsprime.com/fa/.

cadence.title: Monthly cadence · 7-9 hours / month
cadence.subtitle: Four-week cycle. Adnika delivers the kit; Ehsan or CMS Prime marketing executes.

rows.what: Regulator directories (FSC Mauritius, SVG, Saint Lucia) + free broker directories. Highest ROI free wins.
Regional MENA/Asia directory pushes + partnership outreach (Trading Central, MetaQuotes/MQL5).
Resource page outreach (slow ROI) + 1 press release if there's a real product launch this month.
7-day and 14-day follow-ups on outstanding outreach. Archive completed rows. Review the tracker.

files.subtitle: Living files for the agency + client team

rows.purpose: 60+ prioritized target domains with tier, AS estimate, contact method, cost

rows.purpose: Pipeline log — status, follow-up dates, placement outcomes

prose.title: The link graph is the trust graph.
paragraphs: After the May-Jun foundation work (hreflang, enriched Organization schema, FAQ schema, broken-link repair, 586-domain disavow filing), cmsprime.com’s on-site signals are clean. What’s still thin is the off-site equity: 720 referring domains is a respectable count but the authority distribution is bottom-heavy. Only 15 domains above AS 40 means we’re competing on commercial keywords against rivals with stronger link graphs.

Month 2 doesn’t try to fix that in 30 days. It puts the cheapest, fastest, most defensible plays first: three regulator directory listings we already qualify for (FSC Mauritius, SVG, Saint Lucia), four to six free broker-directory submissions, and one partnership ask on the Trading Central side. That set alone should land 6-10 new dofollow links inside the first 30 days at zero spend.

The harder tier — editorial reviews on forexbrokers.com, brokerchooser.com, fxempire.com — waits on a client budget conversation. Premier broker directories don’t link for free, and they’re right not to. Once placement budget is approved, those become the AS 60+ links the profile is currently missing.

pull_quote.text: Six to ten new dofollow links in the first 30 days at zero spend, if the regulator + free directory list ships in week 1.
